sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship-based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls aircraft (Twinbee, Winbee, or Gwinbee) in fixed-screen or scrolling shmup gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Multi-player Simultaneous Control
special_mechanics.description: Japanese version supports up to 3 players simultaneously with separate controllable ships; US version limited to 2 players

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources contain only release information, regional differences, and narrative content. No physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity, or jump mechanics are documented. Game is a shoot-em-up (shmup) paradigm title where traditional platformer physics do not apply.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Stinger (NES, Famicom Disk System) article
